Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Undroidwish – a single-file, batteries-included Tcl/Tk binary for many platforms 61 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. OpenBSD on Motorola 88000 Processors 23 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. rpg.actor Game Jam 62 upvotes, 5 comments
  4. I Built an Open-World Engine for the N64 [video] 339 upvotes, 57 comments
  5. Detecting file changes on macOS with kqueue 62 upvotes, 8 comments
  6. Circuit-level PDP-11/34 emulator 45 upvotes, 5 comments
  7. Linux is an interpreter 154 upvotes, 29 comments
  8. Founder of GitLab battles cancer by founding companies 653 upvotes, 160 comments
  9. My heuristics are wrong. What now? 29 upvotes, 3 comments
  10. Spanish legislation as a Git repo 689 upvotes, 212 comments
  11. CSS is DOOMed 155 upvotes, 42 comments
  12. Cocoa-Way – Native macOS Wayland compositor for running Linux apps seamlessly 297 upvotes, 93 comments
  13. Meta Partners with Arm to Develop New Class of Data Center Silicon 27 upvotes, 4 comments
  14. Improved Git Diffs with Delta, Fzf and a Little Shell Scripting 116 upvotes, 34 comments
  15. I decompiled the White House's new app 348 upvotes, 124 comments
  16. OpenCiv1 – open-source rewrite of Civ1 76 upvotes, 25 comments
  17. The first 40 months of the AI era 93 upvotes, 33 comments
  18. Stop picking my Go version for me 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. Goldman Sachs now reckons that oil could take out the 2008 record of $147 38 upvotes, 14 comments
  20. Private equity turned vulnerable elderly people into human ATMs 65 upvotes, 30 comments
  21. South Korea Mandates Solar Panels for Public Parking Lots 56 upvotes, 27 comments
  22. AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice 505 upvotes, 397 comments
  23. Further human + AI + proof assistant work on Knuth's "Claude Cycles" problem 132 upvotes, 94 comments
  24. Sealing Paper Packaging Without Adhesives 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Computer chip material inspired by the human brain could slash AI energy use 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. C++26: A User-Friednly assert() macro 59 upvotes, 46 comments
  27. 1929: Inside the Greatest Crash in Wall Street History 39 upvotes, 38 comments
  28. ICAO issued new power bank restriction on flight 55 upvotes, 80 comments
  29. TreeTrek – A raw Git repository viewer web app 4 upvotes, 2 comments
  30. InpharmD (YC W21) Is Hiring – Senior Ruby on Rails Developer 0 upvotes, 0 comments
